Dear Customer Service, I am writing to bring to your attention a serious billing discrepancy on my account. For the past three months, I have been charged $149.99 per month instead of the $99.99 per month that was quoted to me when I signed up for the Premium plan in October. I have attached screenshots of the original promotional offer as well as my last three billing statements showing the incorrect amount. I would like a full credit for the $150 overcharge ($50 x 3 months) and I want my account corrected to reflect the proper rate going forward. Please respond within 48 hours or I will escalate this matter.

I received your automated response but it does not address my concern. To reiterate: I signed up under a promotional rate of $99.99/month. My contract, which I still have a copy of, explicitly states this rate for 12 months. I am only 3 months into the contract period. The fact that I am being charged $149.99 is a breach of the agreed terms. I would appreciate a response from someone with the authority to issue the credit and correct the billing going forward. Additionally, I would like an itemized breakdown of all charges on my account for the past 6 months so I can verify there are no other discrepancies.

Thank you for looking into this. I would also like to request a copy of my original contract showing the promotional rate, and I need an official invoice or statement that shows the corrected charges after the credit is applied. This documentation is needed for my records and potential legal review if the issue is not resolved satisfactorily. I trust we can resolve this amicably but I need paper trail.

The estimated delivery was February 18th. I need an update on the shipping status. Second, I noticed that I was charged $34.99 for a subscription renewal that I thought I had canceled last month. I do not want to continue with this subscription and I want a refund for the renewal charge. Third, I have a $25 gift card that I want to apply to my next purchase but the redemption page gives me an error when I try to enter the code.

Regarding the shipping issue, I just checked and the tracking number still shows no movement. At this point I would like to either have the order reshipped via express delivery at no extra cost, or receive a full refund including the original shipping charge. For the subscription, please confirm in writing that it has been canceled and that no further charges will occur. For the gift card issue, the code is GC-2024-ABCDE and the error message says invalid code format. Can you verify if this gift card is still valid and has a balance?

One more thing I forgot to mention. I also need to update the shipping address on my account because I recently moved. My new address should be used for any future orders and for the reshipped package if you decide to resend it. The new address is 742 Maple Street, Unit 3B, Portland OR 97201. Please confirm the address change was successful.

I am writing to request the permanent closure of my account effective immediately. I have been a customer since 2019 but over the past year the quality of service has declined significantly. Between the constant billing errors, the poor customer support response times, and the recent price increases with no improvement in service, I no longer wish to maintain this relationship. Before closing the account, I need to ensure the following: all pending orders are either delivered or refunded, any remaining account balance or loyalty points are transferred to a payment method of my choosing, and that all my personal data is deleted per your privacy policy. Please confirm these steps and provide a timeline.

Thank you for the response. Yes, I am certain I want to close the account. Regarding my remaining balance of $42.17 and my 8,500 loyalty points, please issue a check or direct deposit for the cash balance and convert the loyalty points to their cash equivalent as stated in your terms of service Section 8.3. I also need a final account statement showing all transactions from account opening to closure, and written confirmation that my personal data has been queued for deletion. Can you also confirm there are no early termination fees given that my original contract period ended in 2022?

I purchased a TechPro Wireless Router (Model WR-5000) from your platform on September 15th, order number 66201. The product came with a 2-year manufacturer warranty. As of last week, the device stopped functioning properly. It drops the WiFi connection every 30 minutes and the 5GHz band no longer works at all. I have already performed factory resets, firmware updates, and tried different power supplies as suggested in the troubleshooting guide. None of these resolved the issue. I would like to initiate a warranty claim and either receive a replacement unit or a full refund. The product is well within the warranty period and has been used normally. I have the original receipt and packaging.

Per your request, here are the details for the warranty claim: purchase date September 15th 2024, order number 66201, product serial number WR5K-2024-78903. The defect first appeared approximately two weeks ago. I can provide photos of the device showing the status lights that indicate the 5GHz radio failure. I would prefer a replacement over a refund if possible, but if the same model is no longer available then a refund to the original payment method would be acceptable. How long does the warranty replacement process typically take? I need a working router for my home office.

I've been waiting a week since submitting the warranty claim and haven't heard back. Can I get a status update? Also, in the meantime, can I purchase a temporary replacement at a discounted rate or use store credit? I literally cannot work without internet and this is becoming urgent. I checked my loyalty points and it looks like I have some balance that might help offset the cost.

I want to provide detailed feedback about several issues I have experienced over the past month. On March 1st, I tried to use the promotional code SPRING25 which was advertised on your homepage but the system rejected it at checkout. I contacted chat support and waited 45 minutes only to be told the code had expired, even though the banner was still showing. On March 5th, my auto-renewal was processed at the old higher rate despite the fact that I had changed to the basic plan two weeks prior. I have the confirmation email showing the plan change. On March 10th, I attempted to transfer funds from my rewards balance to my bank account and the transfer failed with no error message. The funds are now in limbo. Each of these incidents required multiple contacts with your support team and none have been fully resolved.

To summarize the resolution I need for each issue: 1) Honor the SPRING25 promotional code on my next order or provide equivalent store credit. 2) Refund the difference between the old plan rate and the basic plan rate for the March billing cycle. 3) Complete the rewards transfer to my bank account and confirm the funds are no longer held. 4) I want all of this documented as a formal complaint. Please provide a case number and the name of the representative handling this. I expect a complete resolution within 5 business days.
